# offload-telemetry

> Go module for redacted Claude Code and Codex offload telemetry. Captures
> operational fields (model, latency, tokens/sec, TTFT, cost, status) while
> ensuring prompts, request bodies, and secrets are never emitted.

## Overview

- Name: offload-telemetry
- Purpose: Shared Go module emitting redacted telemetry events for Claude Code and Codex CLI offload sessions; tracks model, latency (ms), tokens/sec, TTFT (ms), cost (USD), upstream status, and parent task ID without capturing any prompt or secret data.
- Language(s): Go
- License: MIT
- Authoritative README: <https://github.com/nfsarch33/offload-telemetry#readme>
- Source of truth branch: `main`

## Quick Start

- Import:
  ```go
  import "github.com/nfsarch33/offload-telemetry"
  ```
- Build and test:
  ```
  make test
  make vet
  make lint
  ```
- Minimum runtime prerequisites: Go 1.22+

## Key Concepts

- Redacted-by-design envelope: only operational fields are emitted
- Fields: model, latency_ms, tokens_per_sec, ttft_ms, cost_usd, status_code, parent_task_id
- No prompts, request bodies, provider tokens, bearer headers, or secrets in events
- Sentrux quality gate: `make sentrux`

## Runnable Examples

- Run tests: `make test`
- Run quality checks: `make vet && make lint && make sentrux`

## Related Repos

- [cursor-tools](https://github.com/nfsarch33/cursor-tools) — imports this module for tier-a CLI telemetry

## Operational Notes

- Issue tracker: <https://github.com/nfsarch33/offload-telemetry/issues>
